sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26958" key="dikole/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐκολέκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n26958.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δικολόγος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.48</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.313</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
